summary: iOS 🟥 FALCON | Charge Stand is not properly displayed in "Software" tab if it is currently unplugged
feature: iOS FALCON - Device Settings / Software Tab
scenario: Charge Stand name and image are incorrectly displayed in Device Settings' Software tab when unplugged, reverting to normal after reconnecting.
description_clean: Charge Stand is not properly displayed in the "Software" tab under Device Settings when it is unplugged. After unplugging the Charge Stand and restarting the app, the Charge Stand's name changes to match the headset's name and its image is replaced with a placeholder. The display returns to normal once the Charge Stand is plugged back in.
steps: 1. Unplug the Charge Stand from the device.
3. Navigate to Device Settings and open the 'Software' tab.
4. Observe the Charge Stand's name and image display.
expected: The Charge Stand should be properly displayed with its correct name and image in the "Software" tab under Device Settings.
actual: After unplugging the Charge Stand and restarting the app, the Charge Stand's name changes to match the headset's name and its image is replaced with a placeholder. The display returns to normal once the Charge Stand is plugged back in.
